prompt: A cinematic candid photo of 4 young adults standing in front of a smooth studio green screen wall, framed like a behind-the-scenes chroma key test. In the extreme left foreground, a woman with vivid copper-red hair is very close to the lens and heavily out of focus, showing the back and partial side of her head and shoulder, creating strong depth and an over-the-shoulder composition. Slightly left of center in the background, a partially visible man with short curly dark hair and glasses is cropped so only part of his face and torso are visible. He holds 1 blue water bottle near his chest. At center, a woman with medium-brown skin and dark curly shoulder-length hair faces the camera with a neutral expression, wearing a burgundy smocked spaghetti-strap dress and a delicate gold necklace, holding 1 blue patterned water bottle in both hands at waist level. On the right, another woman with long straight dark brown hair faces the camera in a fitted short-sleeve knit top with horizontal beige, brown, and muted red stripes. The lighting is moody and cinematic with teal-green and warm reddish tones, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, subtle film grain, and a casual documentary feel. Medium shot, eye-level framing, indoor studio environment, no props besides the 2 visible bottles, plain green chroma background filling the scene, natural posture, realistic photography, anamorphic-style color grading.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影感十足的抓拍照片，4 位年轻人站在平滑的摄影棚绿幕墙前，构图如同幕后色度键测试。在画面最左侧前景，一位留着鲜艳铜红色头发的女性非常靠近镜头且处于重度虚焦状态，仅露出头部后侧和部分肩膀，营造出强烈的景深和过肩构图感。背景中偏左侧，一位留着深色短卷发并佩戴眼镜的男性部分可见，画面经过裁剪，仅露出部分脸部和躯干，他胸前拿着 1 个蓝色水瓶。画面中心，一位中等肤色、留着深色齐肩卷发的女性面朝镜头，表情自然，身穿酒红色褶皱细肩带连衣裙，佩戴精致的金项链，双手在腰间拿着 1 个带有蓝色图案的水瓶。右侧，另一位留着深棕色长直发的女性面朝镜头，身穿横条纹（米色、棕色和暗红色）修身短袖针织衫。灯光呈现出电影般的氛围感，带有青绿色和温暖的红调，柔和的阴影，浅景深，真实的皮肤质感，细腻的胶片颗粒，以及随性的纪录片风格。中景镜头，平视构图，室内摄影棚环境，除 2 个可见的水瓶外无其他道具，纯色绿幕背景填满画面，姿态自然，写实摄影，变形镜头风格调色。

breakdown.creativeCore: 绿幕前的电影感合影：此提示词可生成一张四位年轻人在色度绿幕背景前的写实幕后工作室照片，适用于电影制作或 AI 视频工作流视觉素材。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, documentary, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, film grain, lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
